ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Confirmation – Next 30 Days
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We hope you are enjoying the full benefits of our SaaS platform.

This is a friendly reminder that your subscription plan (Premium) will renew on 15 May 2026. The renewal amount of INR 12,000 will be automatically charged to the card you have on file.

If you wish to change the plan, add users, or cancel the renewal, please login to your account at <URL> and update your settings before 08 May 2026.

Thank you for choosing our services. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,

Customer Support Team

P.S. Keep your subscription active to continue accessing all premium features.

spam.subject: ⚠️ Immediate Action Required: QuickBooks Invoice Overdue
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We are writing to inform you that your QuickBooks invoice #QB2026-0045 is still outstanding. Your account has been flagged for non‑payment and your access to Norton Antivirus will be suspended within 48 hours if payment is not received.

Please verify your payment details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you have already made the payment, ignore this notice. Otherwise, act now to avoid service interruption. For any queries, reply to this email.

Sincerely,

Accounts Department
QuickBooks Support
